Appearances:
Plaintiff Uravi LLC is present. Represented by Vik Devdhara.
Attorney Howard Olsen appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Christopher Casper is present.
Attorney Laura Chi representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Paul Renne, litigants and counsel confer in Dept.502B, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed. The trial date of Oct-15-2012 is vacated.(501/JPT)
